description: Colombian criminal and narcoparamilitary organization based in Medellín, formed in 2008 from remnants of paramilitary groups demobilized during peace talks (2004-2006). It was founded by former members of the Oficina de Envigado after the extradition of Don Berna. The group engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. It was dissolved by Colombian security forces in 2014, with remaining members joining the Clan Úsuga.
